SEARCH
Package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item

Class ModItems

java.lang.Object
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.ModItems
public class ModItems extends Object
Registers custom items.

This class handles the creation and registration of custom magical wand items, specifying their behavior and stack sizes.

Example: LightningWandItem, FireWandItem, EarthWandItem, WaterWandItem

Since:
0.1.0

  • Field Details

    • ITEMS

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister.Items ITEMS
      Deferred registry for items, linked to the mod ID.

    • LIGHTNING_WAND

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredItem<net.minecraft.world.item.Item> LIGHTNING_WAND
      Lightning Wand.

      Casts lightning strikes at targeted locations.

    • FIRE_WAND

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredItem<net.minecraft.world.item.Item> FIRE_WAND
      Fire Wand.

      Shoots large fireballs in the direction the player is facing.

    • EARTH_WAND

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredItem<net.minecraft.world.item.Item> EARTH_WAND
      Earth Wand.

      Creates temporary walls of earth blocks at targeted locations.

    • WATER_WAND

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredItem<net.minecraft.world.item.Item> WATER_WAND
      Water Wand.

      Creates a temporary sphere of water prison blocks in front of the player.
